title: Ezekiel Solesi Joins Sam Adeyemi, Fela Durotoye, Others in Forbes Coaches Council
description: Nigerian business strategy consultant and Founder, LIMBsimple, Ezekiel Solesi has joined the league of the Executive and Behavioural Change Coach, Lanre Olusola; Founder and Senior Pastor of Daystar C
html:
Nigerian business strategy consultant and Founder, LIMBsimple, Ezekiel Solesi has joined the league of the Executive and Behavioural Change Coach, Lanre Olusola; Founder and Senior Pastor of Daystar Christian Centre, Sam Adeyemi; and former presidential candidate and nation builder, Fela Durotoye in the Forbes Coaches Council.

The Forbes Business Council is an invitation-only community for successful executives and entrepreneurs bringing proven leaders from every industry, creating a curated, social capital-driven network that helps every member to grow professionally and make an even greater impact on the business world.

Speaking on Ezekiel’s acceptance into the council, the Forbes Business Council Founder, Scott Gerber maintained that the council arrived at the decision after he (Ezekiel) was vetted and selected by a review committee based on the depth and diversity of his experience which includes a track record of successfully impacting business growth metrics and professional achievements and honors.

As an accepted member of the Council, Ezekiel will benefit from exclusive access to vetted business service partners, membership-branded marketing collateral, and the high-touch support of the Forbes Councils member concierge team.

Ezekiel also has access to a variety of exclusive opportunities designed to help him reach peak professional influence, collaborating with other respected local leaders in a private forum and working with a professional editorial team to share his expert insights in original business articles on Forbes.com, and to contribute to published Q&A panels alongside other experts.

He’s a seasoned business strategy consultant and management coach that has worked with over 2,400 businesses across Africa and helped 32 of them exceed one billion per year in revenue.

Ezekiel is a prolific author, insightful speaker, and serial entrepreneur, and his activities as a speaker and business strategy facilitator spans over a variety of industries and still counting.

In reaction to the acceptance, Ezekiel expressed his excitement to be part of the highest coaches in the world as he looks forward to unlocking more possibilities and using the platform to grow his network.

“I’m excited to be part of this prestigious community of the highest coaches in the world. I believe it will both help me expand my coaching business, network, and learn directly from the best minds in the world, he said.
